title: 30 Pack Reusable Plastic Plates, 10 Inch/25cm Round Dinner & Side Plates for Picnic, Kids, Toddler, Indoor Outdoor Use – BPA Free, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe, 6 Assorted Colours
features: HEALTHY MATERIAL & DURABLE: The reusable plates are made of high quality PP material, food safe and BPA-free, lightweight and sturdy, lasting for long time use. The edges are smooth, comfortable to hold.【 Top rack dishwasher-safe, microwave safe(Reheat Only)】

ELEGANT DESIGN: Include 30 pack plastic plates in 6 color, yellow, purple, gray, plum, green and deep green. Each color 5 pieces. Vibrant bright color,cheer up your kitchen! 24.6 cm diameter and 2.2 cm height, Great for both indoor and outdoor use.

STACKABLE DESIGN：The dinner plates are stackable, stacked neatly and fit well in your cupboard. These plastic plate are unbreakable, perfect plates for the kids meals, no worry that the plates break to hurt your kids.

VERSATILE USAGE : These reusable plates are made are versatile and can be used for Nice plates for snack, salad, noodle, pasta, dessert and more, great to use it for beach, pool, camping and picnics, ideal for camping or for use in RVs and trailers. These plates are perfect for serving appetizers, main courses, desserts, and drinks.

QUALITY SERVICE: We have been committed to providing buyers with the most considerate service. If you have any questions about our heavy-duty plastic plates. Please contact us, we will give you the most satisfactory answer.
